---
name: Feature
about: Propose a new feature
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

<!-- One or two paragraphs. What is this feature and what does it do? The elevator pitch — answer "what is this and why does it exist" in plain terms. -->

---

## Motivation

<!-- Why this feature, why now. Captures the reasoning so the issue doesn't rot silently when context is forgotten. What problem is solved or what opportunity is seized? -->

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

---

## Out of Scope

<!-- Explicitly name what this issue does NOT cover. Prevents scope creep and answers "why isn't X in here" before the question is asked. -->

- 

---

<!--
OPTIONAL SECTIONS — include only when warranted, delete otherwise:

## User Stories
(Include only when the feature originated from a user/player request. Omit for internally-generated features.)

## Design
(Non-trivial technical or UX decisions: data model changes, architectural choices, UI flow decisions.)

## Implementation Notes
(Phase sequencing, dependency order, specific files and what changes in each.)

## Open Questions
(Genuine unresolved forks that block or materially affect the implementation. Remove entries as they are resolved.)

LABELS:
- `enhancement`  — apply to all feature issues
- `future`       — add when the feature is deferred from the active MVP cycle; remove when it moves into scope

TITLE FORMAT:
- [Feature] Title In Title Case
- Title case throughout; no conventional-commit prefixes (feat:, fix:, etc.)
-->
